title: Water Leakage in Bathroom
description: There is continuous water leakage from the ceiling in the master bathroom. It has been happening for 3 days and needs urgent attention.

title: Lift Not Working
description: Block B lift is not operational since yesterday evening. Senior citizens are facing difficulty climbing stairs.

title: Noise Disturbance at Night
description: The residents of C-201 are playing loud music after 11 PM regularly. It is disturbing sleep for the entire floor.

title: Garbage Not Collected
description: The garbage from Block A corridor has not been collected for 2 days. It is causing foul smell.

title: Parking Space Blocked
description: An unknown vehicle is parked in my allotted parking slot P-D-02 for the past two days. Vehicle number: MH-12-AB-9876.

title: Common Area Lights Not Working
description: The lights in the Block B staircase between floors 1 and 2 are not working. It is very dark at night and poses a safety risk.

title: Swimming Pool Maintenance Needed
description: The swimming pool water appears green and has not been cleaned in over a week. Health risk for users.

title: Water Supply Disruption
description: No water supply to Block D from 6 AM to 12 PM for the last 3 days. Morning routines are severely impacted.

title: Security Gate Malfunction
description: The automatic gate at the main entrance is not closing properly. It remains open for extended periods posing a security risk.

title: Terrace Garden Needs Attention
description: Plants on the terrace garden are withering due to lack of watering. The irrigation system appears to be broken.
